movie.actors: Charles Bronson, Deborah Raffin, Ed Lauter, Martin Balsam
movie.plot: Paul Kersey, New York City architect and part-time vigilante, returns from L.A. to visit an old friend. Instead, he must avenge his death by fighting youth gangs.
movie.title: Death Wish 3
movie.writer: Don Jakoby, Brian Garfield (characters created by)
